context_and_goals.highlight: EIP-8141 (Frame Transactions) was CFI'd for Hegotá but not selected as headliner
Client teams want clarity on mempool, stateless, privacy, post-quantum implications
Core goals: reduce centralized relayers, support FOCIL, enable post-quantum readiness

proposal_updates.highlight: Frame transactions: payment frame can precede sender validation for mempool efficiency
EIP-8223: Contract payer transaction enables one-to-one EOA-to-vault relationships
EIP-7906: Transaction assertions provide safety envelope preventing malicious side effects
Ethrex devnet for frame transactions running with faucet and example contracts

adoption_concerns.highlight: Trust Wallet: ~100M weekly 7702 transactions; meaningful wallet adoption takes time
Three adoption barriers: audit requirements, relayer dependency, cross-chain reliability
L2 consensus needed on predictable performance/costs for native AA

technical_challenges.highlight: Ben: EVM-based signature validation could cost 2M gas vs 3K for precompiles
Vitalik: Hash-based signatures work without precompiles; lattice needs vectorization precompile
Carlos: ERC-20 gas payment conflicts with statelessness—whitelist or full state required
Prestwich: Many claimed benefits (ERC-20s, post-quantum) remain unspecified/unproven

roadmap_context.highlight: Vitalik timeline: 2026 AA, 2027-28 state, 2029-30 VM work

action_items.action: Continue L2 discussions to reach consensus on native AA performance requirements
action_items.owner: Frame authors, Base, Arbitrum, OP teams

action_items.action: Define strategy for ERC-20 sponsorship vs statelessness tradeoffs
Collaborate on EIP-7906 demo using Ethrex frame transactions devnet
